<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Laminas\Diactoros\Exception; use RuntimeException; use Throwable; class UploadedFileAlreadyMovedException extends RuntimeException implements ExceptionInterface { /** {@inheritDoc} */ public function __construct( string $message = 'Cannot retrieve stream after it has already moved', int $code = 0, ?Throwable $previous = null ) { parent::__construct($message, $code, $previous); } }
